description: Phase 1 protected-path baseline. git blob SHA-1 (git hash-object) per file at the committed HEAD when the daily integrity check was set up. The 7am check compares these against the current GitHub HEAD of each repo. Any change = drift to flag.
note_revision: Updated 2026-06-11 post Phase 3 merge. fortress-ai main=60884111 (Phase 3 merged; protected blobs unchanged). trading-bot master=cd2c24d and is now the GitHub DEFAULT branch (main/master split reconciled). Phase 1+2+3 all verified clean. (HEAD bumped after docs sync 6088411; protected blobs unchanged)
